originalTitle: 'I was tortured and lost my hand' - one student's struggle to get an education in Nigeria
title: 'I was tortured and lost my hand' - one student's struggle to get an education in Nigeria
content: The BBC speaks to a student who pushed for his toe print to be taken to verify his identity.

originalTitle: South African opposition figure Malema sentenced to five years in prison for firing a gun
title: South African opposition figure Malema sentenced to five years in prison for firing a gun
content: Malema is appealing against the decision, which means he is not going to prison immediately.

originalTitle: Pope lashes out at foreigners who exploit Africa
title: Pope lashes out at foreigners who exploit Africa
content: The pontiff has been unusually forthright during his visit to conflict-hit Cameroon.

originalTitle: Can Hungary wean itself off Russian energy, as its new leader has promised?
title: Can Hungary wean itself off Russian energy, as its new leader has promised?
content: Magyar’s pitch to Hungarian voters was to turn away from some of Orban’s policies, including Russian energy imports.

originalTitle: Pope Leo calls on Cameroonians to reject violence as 120,000 join Mass
title: Pope Leo calls on Cameroonians to reject violence as 120,000 join Mass
content: Preaching at a packed stadium in Douala, Pontiff shares a message of hope, peace and faith during Africa trip.

originalTitle: The Iran war has exposed the limits of neutrality
title: The Iran war has exposed the limits of neutrality
content: From Gulf energy shocks to divisions among allies, the conflict has made strategic ambiguity harder to sustain.

originalTitle: Trump's Lebanon ceasefire takes Israel by surprise
title: Trump's Lebanon ceasefire takes Israel by surprise
content: Few Israelis see this truce as a way out of the conflict with Hezbollah, the BBC's Lucy Williamson writes.

originalTitle: Singer D4vd arrested on suspicion of murdering teenage girl
title: Singer D4vd arrested on suspicion of murdering teenage girl
content: The remains of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez were found in the singer's car last year.

originalTitle: Finance ministers and top bankers raise serious concerns about Mythos AI model
title: Finance ministers and top bankers raise serious concerns about Mythos AI model
content: Experts say Mythos potentially has an unprecedented ability to identify and exploit cyber-security weaknesses.

originalTitle: Italy made me a manager when England 'discouraged' me - Cole
title: Italy made me a manager when England 'discouraged' me - Cole
content: Ashley Cole won 107 caps for England, seventh on the all‑time list, but says he was "discouraged" by those in the football pyramid from becoming a head coach.

originalTitle: Nobody says who called first, but Arteta and Guardiola speak again - Balague
title: Nobody says who called first, but Arteta and Guardiola speak again - Balague
content: As Manchester City prepare to host Arsenal in Sunday's crucial Premier League meeting between the top two, European football expert Guillem Balague looks at how the two managers have evolved.

originalTitle: Leicester need something special to beat drop - Rowett
title: Leicester need something special to beat drop - Rowett
content: Leicester City boss Gary Rowett says "belief" in increasingly dire times will be key to the Foxes' Championship survival hopes.
